what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-assets channel, linking an attachment id to a target image URI and recording its type and addition timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content.
Attachment id att-7e453c5b in channel design-assets.
target is an image:// URI pointing to design-assets/diagrams/Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 9.
standouts: Uses a URI scheme (image://) to reference the actual asset.
Attachment acts as a cross-reference record between a channel and a design asset.
conventions: Markdown file with YAML frontmatter metadata.
Uses id, channel, attachment_type, target, added fields.
notes: This is a lightweight channel attachment index entry that points to a design image asset.
questions: What is the expected resolution or format of the target image?
Is the target URI resolvable by the current tooling?
What does 'Frame 9' denote in the design asset naming?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose (image attachment record) matches the content: it records an attachment id, channel, type, target URI, and timestamp.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, queryable record associating a design-assets channel entry with a specific diagram image.
contribution: Provides a stable attachment identifier and a machine-resolvable target URI for an image asset, enabling indexing and retrieval of design artifacts by channel.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment metadata file that registers image attachment att-7e453c5b in the design-assets channel, pointing to image://design-assets/diagrams/Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 9 and recording an addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to catalog and link a design image asset to the design-assets channel for later reference or rendering.
